# tradicted

Last updated: 2026-05-13

> tradicted is a free stock market trading simulator and mobile game for iOS and Android.
> Practice trading risk-free with $100,000 virtual cash using 100% real historical market data.
> Compete on global leaderboards, get AI-powered stock analysis via cortexAI and learn
> technical analysis through hands-on repetition — no real money required.
> Built solo by Robert Gorak, a trader and developer with 15 years in IT (BMW, Airbus).

For full page content see: [llms-full.txt](https://www.tradicted.com/llms-full.txt)

## Download
- [App Store (iOS)](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/stock-trading-game-simulator/id6739497557)
- [Google Play (Android)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.mycompany.tradicted)

## Core Pages
- [Homepage](https://www.tradicted.com/): Practice trading risk-free
- [How It Works](https://www.tradicted.com/how-it-works/): Step-by-step guide
- [About](https://www.tradicted.com/about/): Founder story and mission
- [FAQ](https://www.tradicted.com/faq/): Full Q&A about the app
- [Academy](https://www.tradicted.com/learn/): Free trading guides
- [Tools](https://www.tradicted.com/tools/): Free trading calculators

- [What Is Risk-to-Reward Ratio?](https://www.tradicted.com/learn/what-is-risk-to-reward-ratio/)

## Free Trading Calculators
- [Kelly Criterion Calculator](https://www.tradicted.com/tools/kelly-criterion-calculator/): Calculate optimal position size using win rate and reward-to-risk ratio
- [Position Size Calculator](https://www.tradicted.com/tools/position-size-calculator/): Calculate how many units or shares to trade based on risk per trade
- [Risk of Ruin Calculator](https://www.tradicted.com/tools/risk-of-ruin-calculator/): Estimate probability of blowing a trading account given win rate and risk per trade
- [Risk Reward Calculator](https://www.tradicted.com/trading-journal/): Calculate risk-to-reward ratio from entry, stop loss and take profit levels
- [Pip Value Calculator](https://www.tradicted.com/tools/pip-value-calculator/): Calculate pip value in account currency for forex and gold pairs
- [Lot Size Calculator](https://www.tradicted.com/tools/lot-size-calculator/): Calculate correct forex lot size based on account risk and stop loss distance

## Quizzes & Assessments
- [Financial Literacy Test](https://www.tradicted.com/tools/financial-literacy-test/): 15 questions across investing basics, compound interest, risk management and stock market fundamentals — free, no signup, instant explanations
- [Stock Market Quiz](https://www.tradicted.com/tools/stock-market-quiz/): 10 questions across technical analysis, risk management, trading psychology and market basics — shuffled each round, links to Academy articles
- [Fake Trading Simulator](https://www.tradicted.com/tools/fake-trading-simulator/): Free browser-based fake trading simulator — guess if price goes up or down across 15 trades using real chart patterns, no sign-up required
